character_buff.name: Gun Master
character_buff.description: Increases Squad members ability by giving advices about guns. Canceled with a stance change.
character_buff.target: All allies within a range of 12m and all squad members who are using shooting stances

effects: [Shooting Stances] ATK +20%, Accuracy +20, Critical +20, Ignore DEF +3%

skills.name: Stinger Shot
skills.description: Shoots a bullet deeply on a far away enemy. Level of [Overheating] is increased by 5 in its use.

skills.name: Smoke Screen
skills.description: Throws a grenade quickly to wrap enemy in flames. Smoke remains at the place where the grenade exploded and PC inside the smoke can see nothing in front for a while.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 10m away and within a 5m radius

Creates Smoke Screen at a targeted location for 8 sec. There is a 100% chance to inflict [Sight Block] on PC in Smoke Screen.
